title: Niche playbook: asset-patterns
description: Pattern library Stage 4 uses to categorise scraped images. For each asset category (logo, portfolio, owner, niche-specific), defines the alt-text and filename keywords that identify candidates. Pure data — Stage 4 reads, never writes.

altKeywords.description: Substrings to search for in attributes. Case-insensitive.

filenameKeywords.description: Substrings to search for in image src/filename paths. Case-insensitive.

selectorHints.description: Optional CSS selectors to prefer (e.g. ".logo img", "#hero img").

exclude.description: Substrings that disqualify a candidate from this category (false-positive guards).

priority.description: When a single image matches multiple categories, the higher-priority category wins.
